omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • Account information: We collect data when users create or update their Wave accounts. This may include their name, email, phone number, login name and password, address, and payment or banking information.

• User communications: We collect the data submitted by users when they contact service support, including for the purpose of fulfilling user requests and addressing user complaints, and reporting on the same to regulatory authorities where this is required. Information collected may include feedback or other information submitted by users in connection with service support. We may also record telephone calls to our service support teams.

• User communications: We collect the data submitted by users when they contact service support, including for the purpose of fulfilling user requests and addressing user complaints, and reporting on the same to regulatory authorities where this is required. Information collected may include feedback or other information submitted by users in connection with service support. We may also record telephone calls to our service support teams.

• Identity information: We collect data submitted by users to verify user identity in compliance with our legal obligations. This may include government identification documents such as passports and commercial registrations (which may indicate document numbers as well as birth date, gender, photograph and home address) and photo images of the user. For businesses, this may also include identification information for staff and legal representatives. This information may be collected by an authorized partner on Wave's behalf.
• Contact list information: We may store user contact information within the application to facilitate payments to contacts and capture payment names in transaction records.
